mapper.select: SELECT season_id "seasonId",season_name "seasonName",start_date "startDate",end_date "endDate",active_yn "activeYn",created_at "createdAt" FROM season ORDER BY active_yn DESC,start_date DESC,season_id DESC
SELECT season_id "seasonId",season_name "seasonName",start_date "startDate",end_date "endDate",active_yn "activeYn" FROM season WHERE active_yn=true ORDER BY season_id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT season_id "seasonId",season_name "seasonName",start_date "startDate",end_date "endDate",active_yn "activeYn" FROM season WHERE season_id=#{seasonId}
mapper.update: UPDATE season SET active_yn=true WHERE season_id=#{seasonId}
